---
title: 'It&#39;s about time...'
date: '2017-12-14T17:10:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Topos Men'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1486302788531604526'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/it-about-time.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Men/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Ministry'
  - 'Men'
---

<p dir="ltr">I've been searching for a men's group in Idaho. Not hard mind you, but I've contacted the groups leaders at the Churches I've scouted out. </p>
<p dir="ltr">There are no men's groups like the one I left behind. That shouldn't surprise me, in an area as large as DFW, at one the country's largest churches, there was one group that fit my needs.</p>
<p dir="ltr">So, as unhealed and unready as I feel... Maybe it's time to get one started myself.</p>
<p dir="ltr">I need to set a time, day, location, and stick to it. </p>
<p dir="ltr">Selah</p>
<p dir="ltr"><u>Darrell</u></p>
